title: Create a single-page audit and view the completed report
description: A user can submit a valid product URL, follow the scan flow, and open the finished audit report.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /audit/new
Submit a valid product URL for a single-page audit
Open the scanning view for the new audit
Wait for the audit to complete
Verify the audit report is displayed
Verify audit scores and recommendations are displayed

title: Create account and reach the dashboard
description: A new user can sign up with email and password, complete onboarding, and arrive at the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-up form
Complete the onboarding quiz
Finish onboarding
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Log in and load the dashboard
description: A returning user can log in with email and password and access the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Review a completed audit report
description: A user can open an existing audit report and see the audit scores, pillar breakdown, issues, and recommendations.
category: Audit report viewing and PDF export

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open an existing audit report
Verify the audit scores, pillar breakdown, issues, and recommendations are displayed

title: Complete onboarding and enter the product
description: A new user can finish the onboarding quiz and be redirected into the dashboard experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /onboarding
Complete the platform step
Complete the store step
Complete the goals step
Finish onboarding
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Export an audit report as PDF
description: A user can export a completed audit report as a PDF from the report page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /audit/new
Submit a valid product URL for a single-page audit
Open the scanning view for the new audit
Wait for the audit to complete
Export the audit report as PDF
Verify a PDF export confirmation is visible

title: Track crawl progress for a store audit
description: A user can submit a store URL for a full-site crawl and see crawl progress updates before completion.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /audit/new
Submit a valid store URL for a full-site crawl
Open the crawl progress view for the new job
Wait for progress to update
Verify crawl progress is displayed
Verify the crawl completes successfully

title: Review recent audits and usage on the dashboard
description: This verifies that a returning user can open the dashboard and see recent audits, score trends, and plan usage summary information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the dashboard link
Verify recent audits are displayed
Verify score trend information is displayed

title: Show an authentication error for invalid credentials
description: A user who enters invalid login credentials sees an authentication error and remains on the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with an invalid email
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the login screen is displayed

title: Open an audit from the history list

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the history link
Open a past audit from the list

Update a profile field with a new valid value

Submit the login form

title: Improve store copy with AI
description: This verifies that a Pro user can submit source copy and receive improved AI-generated content on the content improver page.

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

Fill in the improvement goal field with conversion-focused ecommerce copy
Submit the content improvement request
Verify improved content is displayed
Verify the original input remains available in the editor

title: Block onboarding when required answers are missing
description: A user who tries to continue onboarding without required answers sees validation feedback and stays on onboarding.

Attempt to continue without completing required answers

Verify the onboarding screen is displayed
